overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character in a glowing leather jacket walking through rainy London streets at night. The scene features wet reflective pavement, futuristic holographic car advertisements, neon signage, and pedestrians with umbrellas.

passes the blue-lit bus stop shelter and continues along the wet pavement

agents.ego_description: character walks steadily from the crosswalk past a white car toward a bus stop shelter

notable_agents.action: white sedan parked at the crosswalk

entered.detail: tall brick residential buildings with lit windows lining the street
modern bus shelter with blue neon lighting and glass panels

segments.scene_description: The character begins at a rainy street corner, walking past a parked white car and turning left along the sidewalk. The wet asphalt reflects the street lamps as the character approaches and passes a blue-lit bus stop shelter, with brick buildings rising on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined residential street approaching commercial district

events.description: red van drives past on the wet road from right to left
large holographic car advertisement becomes visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: continues walking along the tree-lined street, approaching an intersection with a futuristic billboard visible ahead

notable_agents.action: red van driving down the street past the character

entered.detail: large floating holographic display of a red sports car hovering above buildings
multi-story residential buildings with illuminated windows
trees with autumn foliage lining the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along a tree-lined street with apartment buildings, the character passes a red van driving on the road. In the distance, a large holographic car advertisement becomes visible floating above the buildings ahead, signaling the transition to a more commercial area.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial intersection with holographic billboard and government building

events.description: character crosses the street from left side to right side
passes under the glowing holographic car advertisement creating colored light reflections

agents.ego_description: crosses the street while walking toward the SIRS building, passing pedestrians with umbrellas

segments.scene_description: The character enters a wide intersection dominated by a massive holographic car advertisement floating overhead. Crossing the street, the character passes the SIRS intelligence building on the left while sharing the crosswalk with pedestrians carrying umbrellas. The holographic display casts colorful reflections on the wet pavement below.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with storefronts and parked vehicles

events.description: character walks closely past a parked white van temporarily blocking the view

agents.ego_description: continues along the sidewalk past the SIRS building, walking by other pedestrians and a parked van

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red umbrella walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: black garbage bins lined up on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along the commercial sidewalk past the SIRS building, the character passes other pedestrians with umbrellas and navigates around a parked white van. The street is lined with storefronts and trash bins, with a narrow alley visible ahead on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy residential neighborhood that gradually transforms into a vibrant, holographic commercial district. It begins at a wet street corner, moving past a parked white car and a blue-lit bus stop shelter where the asphalt reflects the dim glow of street lamps. As the character proceeds along a tree-lined street past apartment buildings and a passing red van, a massive holographic car advertisement emerges in the distance, signaling a shift in the environment. The scene then expands into a wide intersection dominated by the floating display, which casts colorful light across the wet pavement as the character crosses the street alongside pedestrians with umbrellas and passes the SIRS intelligence building. Finally, the camera follows the character along a commercial sidewalk lined with storefronts and trash bins, navigating around a parked white van before approaching a narrow alley.
